title: Unit 008 on Nuclear War & the EMP Blackout
fullTitle: September 23, 2022 — Unit 008 on Nuclear War & the EMP Blackout
source: Session transcript (reconstructed from photographed pages of the transcription documents; see the transcription note)
contentNote: Transcription note: this transcript was reconstructed from photographed pages of the community's typed transcription documents; no recording has been located. Page order after the first page is probable rather than text-locked, and the top line of the final page is clipped in the source photo. The session consists of predictions of nuclear war, EMP blackouts, and mass casualties — preserved as spoken, not endorsed.
